title: Teggs Quick Farming
description: Hold a hoe, get some crops. Simple.
body:
### Ever wanted to farm your crops quickly by simply running through them?**  
Well now you can!

All you got to do is hold a hoe and run through any fully grown crop!
# 
### Area is effected by the following:
- Wooden, stone, iron, copper, and gold harvest the block you're on
- Diamond harvests in 3x3 around you
- Netherite harvests in a 5x5 around you
